TransformationDisplayDescriptor.description: Transformation Display Descriptor UI information, such as the order in which the inputs will be displayed.

TransformationDisplayItemDescriptor.description: Transformation Function Display Item Descriptor Describes the field name corresponding to the input field. The name field must match with an input field.

name.description: The name of the field, must correspond with an input field

availability.description: Positions where the transformation function could be called in a transformation block. Possible values:   - first: The function can be called first   - intermediate: The function can be called at any point after the first function

display.description: Order in which the inputs will be displayed by the UI. The fields in the array must match with the `inputs` field.
